wizard.welcomeText: Configure your personal dashboard in a few simple steps.
wizard.languageText: Select the language for your dashboard.
wizard.step1Desc: Let's set up your perfect command center in 3 simple steps.
wizard.dashboardName: What is the name of your dashboard?
wizard.step2Desc: We scan your server for running containers.
wizard.step4Desc1: Your dashboard has been successfully configured.

settings.title: Settings
settings.supportText: Find Hobbithole useful? Support the development!
settings.name: Name
settings.homeWidgetsDesc: Add standalone widgets above your categories. Click a card to add. Synchronized across devices.
settings.bgWarning: ℹ️ The background is stored locally in your browser (too heavy for cross-device sync). If you clear browser data or switch devices, it will be lost. Make a backup to prevent this. Cross-device background is coming in a future release.
settings.dynamicWallpaperDesc: 5 images change automatically with the time of day. Empty slots fall back to the previous available slot. macOS Mojave style.
settings.dynamicWallpaperWarning: ℹ️ Images are automatically compressed to 1920×1080 JPEG (~500KB per slot) so all 5 fit within browser limits. Uploads can be up to 50MB. Stored locally, same caveat as static background.
settings.liveWallpaperWarning:
⚠️ Heavy feature: video is stored as base64 in localStorage. Practical max is ~8MB for most browsers.
Recommended: MP4 / H.264, 720p or 1080p, 5-15s seamless loop, <10MB.
ffmpeg command: ffmpeg -i input.mov -c:v libx264 -t 10 -vf scale=1920:-2 -b:v 4M wallpaper.mp4
settings.dockerScannerDesc: Scan your server for running Docker containers and add them automatically to your dashboard.
settings.heimdallImportDesc: Import your apps from a Heimdall backup JSON file.
settings.homarrImportDesc: Migrate from Homarr — export in Homarr (Settings → Configuration) and upload the JSON file below.
settings.canvasMode: 🎨 Canvas mode (drag widgets freely, with grid snapping)
settings.externalServicesDesc: Configure connections to external services. Cross-device synchronized via config-api.
settings.usbDesc: Manage connected USB drives and external SSDs. Safe eject flushes all data to disk before powering off.
settings.benchmarkDesc: Start a 5-minute measurement to determine the actual usage of all your containers. This temporarily uses CPU capacity, but results remain statically visible without load afterwards.
settings.backupDesc: Export all your settings (apps, theme, widgets, weather config) as JSON. Import a backup to restore or migrate to another device.
settings.themeEngineDesc: Themes override your current appearance with a curated experience.
settings.liveStatusDots: Live status indicator on tiles (green/red dot)
settings.weatherFxDesc: Realistic clouds that move with the actual weather. Rain/snow particles on cloudy/rainy days. Lightning on thunderstorms.
settings.weatherBackdropDesc: Day/night gradient as sky background, stars on clear nights, sun/moon flare. Automatically hidden when you have a wallpaper (your image/video becomes the sky). Synchronized across devices.
settings.weatherTip: Tip: use the search bar above, or manually fill in coordinates via latlong.net
settings.feedbackDesc: Found a bug? Idea for a new widget or theme? Help make Hobbithole better — all feedback comes in on GitHub where it is discussed and planned.
settings.synologyDesc: Add native Synology Package Center apps (that don't run in Docker). Select the ones you have and click Add.
settings.synologyHelper: DSM port only affects apps that use DSM (port 5000 in the list). Plex (32400), Jellyfin (8096), SABnzbd (8080) keep their own port.
settings.vmServiceDesc: Configure Proxmox VE API and SSH Remote connections for VM and service management.
settings.customSearchLabel: Custom Search URL (use %s for search query)
settings.searchTip: Tip: Press Enter in the search bar to search the web, or type to filter apps.
settings.watchtowerDesc: Trigger updates manually from the dashboard. Requires HTTP API in your Watchtower compose — see the widget body for setup steps.
settings.watchtowerUrlHelp: If Watchtower is in dashboard_net: http://watchtower:8080

toast.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields

confirm.deleteApp: Are you sure you want to delete this app?
confirm.deleteCategory: Are you sure you want to delete this category and all apps in it?
confirm.resetAll: Are you sure you want to reset EVERYTHING? This cannot be undone.

feedback.serverConfigNotLoaded: ⚠️ Server config not loaded. Try refreshing the page.
feedback.fillUrlAndToken: ⚠️ Please fill in both URL and token. Leave empty to disable the integration.
feedback.savedTestRecommended: ✓ Saved. Testing the connection is recommended.
feedback.fillUrlTokenBeforeTest: ⚠️ Fill in URL and token before testing.
feedback.watchtowerConnected: ✓ Connected — ${scans} scans performed, ${scanned} containers last scanned.
feedback.watchtowerNoMetrics: ⚠️ Connection OK but Watchtower returns no metrics. Check WATCHTOWER_HTTP_API_METRICS=true in your compose.
feedback.notReachable: ⚠️ Not reachable: ${message}. Check URL, token and whether Watchtower is in dashboard_net.
feedback.fillUrlTokenProxmox: ⚠️ Please fill in both URL and token for Proxmox.
feedback.fillHostUserBeforeTest: ⚠️ Fill in Host and User before testing.
feedback.invalidBackupFile: Not a valid Hobbithole backup file
feedback.videoLoadedMobileDisabled: Video loaded (disabled on mobile — only visible on desktop)
feedback.scanStartedDetail: Scan started. Watchtower is checking all your images at Docker Hub — this may take 30–120 seconds.
feedback.scanCompleted: ✓ Scan completed. Stats below have been updated.
feedback.scanTimeout: Scan is taking longer than 3 min. Check Watchtower logs if in doubt.
feedback.weatherSearchSelected: ✓ ${label} filled in — click Save to confirm.
feedback.fillNameAndUrl: Please fill in both name and URL

ui.configureLocation: Configure a location in settings first.
ui.noAppsWithWidget: No apps with widget configuration found. Configure a widget on an app first via ⋯ → ✏️ Edit.
ui.noBookmarks: No bookmarks yet. Click + to add one.
ui.noAppLinked: No app linked. Choose an app via Settings.
ui.noIcsFeed: No ICS feed configured. Remove and re-add to set a URL.

scanner.noAppsFoundManual: ⚠️ No known apps found. You can add apps manually.
scanner.noAppsInFile: ⚠️ No apps found in this file.
scanner.dockerNotReachableSocket: Docker API not reachable - is the socket mounted?
scanner.dockerCannotReach: ❌ Cannot reach Docker. Make sure the Docker socket is mounted.
scanner.backupOverwriteConfirm: Importing a backup will overwrite ALL your current settings (apps, theme, widgets). Continue?

widgetConfig.linkUrlHelp: Clicking the image opens this URL in a new tab.
widgetConfig.imageUploadHelp: Paste a URL or upload a file (max 500KB — for larger images a URL is better).
widgetConfig.quickstatApiHelp: Fetched server-side (5 min cache). Click ⟳ in widget header to refresh now.
widgetConfig.quickstatJsonPathHelp: For JSON responses, e.g. "data.cpu" or "value". Leave empty if the response is already a number.
widgetConfig.vmserviceProviderHelp: Choose how the service or VM is managed.
widgetConfig.containermanagerHelp: No URL/API key needed — uses the local Docker socket (requires /var/run/docker.sock mount in config-api). Also works for Synology Container Manager.
widgetConfig.iframeUrlHelp: Some sites block embedding via X-Frame-Options. Works best with your own homelab tools.
widgetConfig.calendarIcsHelp: Works with Google Calendar, iCloud, Outlook, Synology Calendar, Nextcloud. Click ⟳ in widget header to refresh now.
widgetConfig.appWidgetDesc: Existing app as large canvas widget
widgetConfig.iframeWidgetDesc: Embed a URL as live frame
widgetConfig.quickstatWidgetDesc: Live number from a custom endpoint
widgetConfig.calendarWidgetDesc: Upcoming events from an ICS feed
